title: SpawnAll
description: This is a plugin that will spawn all mobs potion effects and blocks For testing purposes (supports Magma Hybrid,have not tested on others)
body:
## What Does this Do

This plugin is made to test blocks and entities and potion effects for in development server software like hybrids,It also Supports modded blocks.

## Warning

This may crash your server Be aware  
Mods with Werid IDS like: ars_nouveau: will never be supported i will only support mods with no space between the mod id


## How to Use
**1.** Install On Server  
**2.** Launch Server  
**3.** Run any of the commands  


## Commands

  spawnallmobs:  
    description: Spawn all mobs  
  spawnallitems:  
    description: Spawn all Items Around player  
  spawnallpotioneffects:
    description: Spawn all Potion Effects On yourself  
  placeallblocks:  
    description: Places all blocks in a flat plane  
  togglephysicscancel:  
    description: Disable Physics on a Toggle  

All Commands use on Permission:  
    permission: spawnallmobs.spawn  

For Full descriptions and arguments please run" /help spawnall "

## How to add more mod support

**1.** Go to plugins/SpawnAll/config.yml  
**2.** Add a mod ID like the Example/already added ones  
**3.** SpawnBlocks  
**4.**  If it crashes from a block find the id and add it to the Blacklist.


## Know issues
**1.** Mobs From mdos not spawning,This is a issue with The server software not registering mobs as i would expect and currently has no fix.
